# Ramen Finder Tokyo

> AI-powered ramen shop recommender for tourists visiting Tokyo, Japan.
> Recommends the best ramen restaurants based on broth style, noodle preference, and atmosphere.
> Available in English, Japanese (日本語), Chinese (中文), and Korean (한국어).

## What is Ramen Finder Tokyo?

Ramen Finder Tokyo is a free web service that helps tourists in Tokyo find the perfect ramen restaurant based on their personal taste preferences. Users answer 3 simple questions about their preferred broth, noodle style, and atmosphere, and the service recommends the top matching shops nearby.

## Covered Areas

- Shinjuku (新宿) — 20+ curated shops

Coming soon:
- Shibuya (渋谷)
- Ginza (銀座)
- Ikebukuro (池袋)

## Broth Styles Covered

- Shoyu (醤油) — Soy sauce broth, Tokyo classic
- Miso (味噌) — Rich fermented soybean broth, Hokkaido style
- Tonkotsu (豚骨) — Creamy pork bone broth, Fukuoka style
- Shio (塩) — Delicate salt broth, clean and light
- Tori Paitan (鶏白湯) — Creamy chicken white broth
- Gyokai / Gyokai Tonkotsu (魚介系・豚骨魚介) — Seafood and pork bone blend

## Featured Shops in Shinjuku

- Ramen Hayashida (らーめん林田) — Michelin-listed shio/shoyu
- Tsuta Shinjuku (蔦) — World's first Michelin-starred ramen
- Mugi to Olive (麦と橄欖) — Michelin-listed clam shio
- Fuunji (風雲児) — Celebrated gyokai tsukemen
- ICHIRAN Shinjuku (一蘭) — Iconic solo-booth tonkotsu, open 24hrs
- Kikanbo (鬼金棒) — Spicy karashibi miso specialist
- Wagyu Halal Ramen Kabuki — Halal-certified wagyu ramen
- Ramen Nagi Golden Gai (ラーメン凪) — Legendary niboshi shio, 9 seats only

## Special Dietary Options

- Halal-certified ramen available (Wagyu Halal Ramen Kabuki, Gyumon)
- Vegan options available (Soranoiro, Afuri)
- Vegetarian-friendly options noted

## URL

https://ramen-finder-jp.vercel.app
